name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: At 725 E Broadway in Louisville, Kentucky, the Ria Money Transfer office is accessible.
description_long: Ria Money Transfer is an established international money transfer company that enables consumers to send and receive money across borders through a distributed network of physical agent locations and digital channels. The company operates globally, with service to over 35 countries across Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and Oceania, making it a significant player in the remittance and money transfer market. Ria offers multiple sending methods including online transfers, mobile app transactions, in-person cash payments at agent locations, and WhatsApp-based transfers. Recipients can collect funds through various channels: bank deposits, cash pickups at agent locations, digital wallet deposits, home delivery, and ATM withdrawals. This flexibility accommodates different recipient preferences and banking infrastructure across different countries. The company also provides ancillary services including bill payments through their agent network and currency conversion tools. Ria's primary distinction is its extensive agent network of non-traditional financial service providers—7-Eleven locations, convenience stores, pharmacies, grocery shops, hair salons, and other local retailers—rather than reliance on traditional bank branches. This approach increases accessibility in underserved communities and immigrant neighborhoods. The platform supports multiple languages including Spanish, and offers a mobile app for on-the-go transactions, reflecting modern consumer expectations for digital convenience alongside traditional in-person service. As with all money transfer services, consumers should carefully review current rates and fees before sending, and verify that recipient countries and corridors are supported. The reliance on third-party agents means service quality and hours may vary by location.
pros: Extensive agent network including 24-hour 7-Eleven locations for convenient cash deposits and pickups
Multiple send methods: online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp for flexibility
Diverse recipient options including bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, and ATM withdrawal
Global coverage to 35+ countries across all major regions
Bi-lingual platform support in English and Spanish
Mobile app available for on-the-go money transfers
Bill payment services available at many agent locations
cons: Website does not disclose specific fees, exchange rates, or transfer speed timelines
Service availability and operating hours depend on third-party agent locations, which may be inconsistent
No information provided about regulatory licensing, compliance certifications, or consumer protections
Bill payment and other services only available at select agent locations, not all branches
Recipient country coverage not fully detailed on homepage—must search by country
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending money to family in Latin America, Africa, or Asia
Consumers in urban areas with access to convenience stores, grocery shops, or pharmacies offering Ria services
People preferring cash-based transfers and in-person service over purely digital platforms
Bilingual Spanish speakers seeking accessible money transfer options
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for immigrants, expatriates, and underserved consumers who need affordable international money transfers with in-person service options and diverse payout methods. The main caveat is that specific fees, exchange rates, and transfer speeds are not disclosed on the website, so consumers must contact agents or log into an account to get actual pricing before committing to a transfer.
services: In-person cash transfers at agent locations
